span.p: Cross-service client crates — the narrow HTTP contract

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

p.small:
Each service calls other services only through typed client traits:
boss-assets-client · boss-people-client · boss-jobs-client · boss-catalog-client
boss-inventory-client · boss-shipping-client · boss-policy-client · boss-products-client
boss-classes-client · boss-locations-client · boss-subject-kinds-client · boss-calendar-client
In tests, these are swapped for in-memory fakes — no cross-service HTTP required.
